sessions.title: Initial Setup
sessions.summary: Project setup with CesiumJS + Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles. Cinematic flythrough, 8 landmark billboards, dark/gold branding overlay.
details: CesiumJS 1.119 viewer with Google 3D Tiles (real Macau photogrammetry)
5-stage cinematic flythrough sequence
8 landmark billboards with Chinese/English names
Dark/gold branding overlay with Cinzel + Noto Sans SC fonts
Loading screen with progress bar

sessions.title: Real-Time Day/Night Cycle
sessions.summary: Sun/moon position driven by actual Macau time (UTC+8). Dynamic lighting changes throughout the day.
details: CesiumJS clock synced to real UTC+8 Macau time
Sun and moon position driven by actual date/time
Real-time clock display with day/night/golden hour indicator
Sky atmosphere rendering

sessions.title: Live Weather System
sessions.summary: Real-time Macau weather via Open-Meteo API with rain overlay, fog effects, and cloud-based light dimming.
details: Open-Meteo API integration (free, no key, CORS-friendly)
Weather UI: temperature, conditions, humidity, wind, cloud cover
CSS rain overlay with 3 intensities based on WMO weather codes
CesiumJS fog for fog/rime/heavy overcast conditions
Sun light dimming proportional to cloud cover
Auto-refresh every 15 minutes

sessions.title: Animated Ferry Boats
sessions.summary: 5 ferries on 2 routes crossing Macau's harbor with smooth ping-pong animation and gold-themed boat icons.
details: 5 ferries on 2 routes (Outer Harbour-Taipa, Inner Harbour-Taipa)
CesiumJS CallbackProperty for per-frame position updates
Ping-pong animation with staggered phase offsets
Gold-themed canvas-drawn boat billboard icons
Scale/translucency by distance
Real Macau terminal coordinates

sessions.title: Neon Casino Glow
sessions.summary: 11 glow zones across casino districts with CesiumJS bloom post-processing, activated at night with smooth dusk/dawn transitions.
details: CesiumJS bloom post-processing for neon glow effect
11 glow zones: Cotai Strip, Peninsula, waterfront
Canvas radial gradient billboards as light sources
Time-of-day modulation: full glow 19:00-05:00, ramp at dusk/dawn
Color-coded: gold (casinos), purple (City of Dreams), amber (waterfront)
High-altitude secondary glow for major casinos (visible from bird's eye)
UI indicator showing glow percentage during active hours

sessions.title: Animated Road Traffic
sessions.summary: 19 vehicles on 5 routes across Macau's 3 bridges, Cotai Strip, and peninsula roads with smooth animated movement.
details: 5 traffic routes: Ponte de Amizade, Ponte de Sai Van, Ponte Gov. Nobre de Carvalho, Cotai Strip Boulevard, Avenida da Praia Grande
19 total vehicles with staggered offsets and alternating directions
Reuses ferry ping-pong CallbackProperty pattern for per-frame updates
Canvas radial gradient car icons (12px glowing dots) visible at road level
Scale/translucency by distance for clean appearance at all zoom levels
Bridge Traffic entry in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Airport Approach & Departure Flights
sessions.summary: 4 planes on 2 flight paths (approach from south, departure north) with altitude-interpolated animation over Macau International Airport.
details: 2 flight routes: approach descending from 450m to 15m, departure climbing 15m to 700m
4 total planes with staggered offsets and one-way looping (not ping-pong)
Real MFM runway 16/34 coordinates on Taipa reclaimed land
Altitude-interpolated lerp function for 3D flight paths
20px white-gold glow billboard with bright core for visibility at distance
Airport Flights entry in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Ambient Audio Soundscape
sessions.summary: Procedural 3-layer ambient soundscape using Web Audio API with time-of-day and weather-reactive mixing.
details: 3 sound layers: ocean waves (LFO-modulated filtered noise), wind (bandpass with gusts), city hum (60/120Hz + shimmer)
Time-of-day variation: louder city during day, more ocean at night
Weather-reactive: wind volume scales with real wind speed, rain boosts noise
Smooth 2-second gain ramps for seamless transitions
Mute/unmute toggle button (starts muted, respects browser autoplay policy)
No external audio files — fully procedural via Web Audio API
